title: Planner Output
description: Test planning artifacts generated from semantic rules. Introduces a governed planning stage between semantic rules and BDD generation.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for the planner run that produced this output.

planner_version.description: Planner prompt version used for this run.

results.description: Planner results, one per input semantic rule.

semantic_rule_id.description: ID of the semantic rule this plan was generated from.

test_objective.description: Concise statement of what this test plan validates.

risk_level.description: Risk level of the scenarios planned for this rule.

coverage_intent.description: Description of what the generated scenarios should collectively cover.

scenario_family.description: Category or family name for grouping related scenarios (e.g., price_validation, session_management).

dependency_notes.description: Notes about dependencies between scenarios or external prerequisites.

recommended_validation_strategy.description: Recommended approach for validating the scenarios (e.g., smoke, regression, boundary).

priority.description: Implementation priority for this rule's test plan.

paragraph_ids.description: Source paragraph IDs from the semantic rule for traceability.

atomic_rule_ids.description: Source atomic rule IDs this plan is grounded in.

rule_type.description: Classification rule type from the source semantic rule.
